plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here is my complete implementation plan for the `@ai-sdk/pixelart` provider:

---

## Summary

The plan creates a new **`packages/pixelart`** package modeled exactly on `packages/luma` — the simplest image-only provider in the repo. Only **12 new files** are created plus **1 line change** in the root `tsconfig.json`.

### Architecture
- Implements `ImageModelV3` from `@ai-sdk/provider`
- Extends `ProviderV3` — throws `NoSuchModelError` for language/embedding model calls
- Uses `postJsonToApi` (synchronous JSON API — simpler than Luma's async polling)
- API key loaded from `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var

### New Files (all under `packages/pixelart/`)
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Package metadata, `@ai-sdk/pixelart`, v0.0.0 |
| `tsconfig.json` / `tsconfig.build.json` | TypeScript project references (mirrors luma) |
| `tsup.config.ts` | Single-entry CJS+ESM build |
| `turbo.json`, `vitest.*.config.js` | Build caching, node + edge test configs |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time version injection |
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId`, `PixelArtStyle`, `PixelArtImageSettings` |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3` — posts to `/images/generate`, maps `size`/`seed`/`style`/`pixelDensity`, issues warnings for unsupported `aspectRatio`/`files`/`mask` |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory + `pixelart` default export |
| `src/index.ts` | Public exports |

### Root `tsconfig.json` change
Add `{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }` to the `references` array.
